description.content: The official YouTube channel of Pinoy Big Brother.

accessibilityContext.label: Description. The official YouTube channel of Pinoy Big Brother....tap for more.

title.simpleText: Pinoy Big Brother
Pinoy Big Brother

channelMetadataRenderer.title: Pinoy Big Brother
channelMetadataRenderer.description:
The official YouTube channel of Pinoy Big Brother.

A popular franchise which originated from the Netherlands, Pinoy Big Brother is the pioneering and longest reality television series in the Philippines. Since the Pinoy Big Brother House opened its doors over a decade ago, it has fostered Housemates whose lives mirrored our own experiences and struggles in life – Housemates whose stories inspired us, and whose “pagpapakatotoo” and “paninindigan” reflected and strengthened the Filipino values. 

Visit our official website: http://pinoybigbrother.com/

Our social media accounts:
Facebook - https://www.facebook.com/PBBabscbntv 
Twitter - https://twitter.com/PBBabscbn 
Instagram - https://www.instagram.com/pbbabscbntv/ 
Kumu - https://app.kumu.ph/PBBabscbn
TikTok - https://www.tiktok.com/@pbbabscbn
channelMetadataRenderer.keywords: ABS-CBN "ABS-CBN Philippines" "Pinoy Big Brother" PBB "Pinoy Big Brother Lucky Season 7" "PBB Season 7" "PBB Lucky Season 7" "PBB 7"
